case_title: SINKEVICH, SVETLANA et al VS CITY TOYOTA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINKEVICH, SVETLANA SINKEVICH, SERGEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY TOYOTA $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,726.00, DEFENDANT CONSENTS TO JURISDICTION.
